title: OpenEPCIS Electronics Vocabulary
description:
Electronics-specific vocabulary extending GS1 Web Vocabulary for Digital Product Passports.

OpenEPCIS DPP-Ready: The Universal DPP Platform - harmonizing GS1, UNTP, and CIRPASS-2 standards.

This vocabulary provides comprehensive coverage for electronic and electrical equipment under:
- EU ESPR 2024/1781 framework (computers, servers, smartphones, tablets)
- French Repairability Index (Indice de Réparabilité) - 5 criteria, 100-point scoring
- EU Right to Repair 2025 - A-E repairability grades
- WEEE Directive 2012/19/EU - 6 equipment categories
- RoHS Directive 2011/65/EU - Restricted hazardous substances
- EU Energy Labeling 2019/2021 - A-G efficiency classes, EPREL registry
- CIRPASS-2 electronics pilots - Multi-component DPP tracking

Standards Alignment:
- GS1 Web Vocabulary (native foundation)
- UN Transparency Protocol (UNTP) alignment via owl:equivalentProperty
- IEC 62474 material declarations
- IEC 82474-1:2025 material efficiency
- ISO/IEC 12207 software lifecycle
- ISO/IEC 14764 software maintenance

GS1 Properties to Use (not redefined here):
- gs1:gtin - Global Trade Item Number
- gs1:productName - Product name
- gs1:brand - Brand information
- gs1:manufacturingDate - Manufacturing date
- gs1:countryOfOrigin - Country of manufacture
- gs1:manufacturer - Manufacturer organization
- gs1:warranty / gs1:WarrantyPromise - Warranty information
- gs1:certification / gs1:CertificationDetails - Certifications
- gs1:regulatoryInformation - Regulatory compliance (RoHS, CE, etc.)
- gs1:netWeight / gs1:grossWeight - Product weight

EPCIS 2.0 Extension Declaration:
GS1-Extensions: electronics=https://ref.openepcis.io/extensions/eu/electronics/

Extension Governance:
This vocabulary extends GS1 Web Vocabulary only where no equivalent term exists.
Each extension term includes dcterms:source, skos:note, and rdfs:seeAlso where applicable.
All ratio/fraction properties use 0-1 decimal scale (e.g., 0.45 = 45%).

classes.label: Component Bill of Materials
classes.comment:
Bill of Materials for multi-component electronics supporting CIRPASS-2 nested DPP
requirements. Links individual components to their own Digital Product Passports.

classes.label: Display Specification
classes.comment: Display-specific technical specifications for monitors, TVs, and device screens.

classes.label: Energy Efficiency
classes.comment:
EU Energy Label data including efficiency class (A-G), power consumption metrics,
and EPREL registry information per EU Energy Labeling Regulation 2019/2021.

classes.label: Repairability Index
classes.comment:
French Repairability Index (Indice de Réparabilité) assessment using the official
5-criteria, 100-point scoring methodology. The score is displayed to consumers as 0-10 scale.

Five Criteria (20 points each):
1. Documentation - Availability of repair documentation
2. Disassembly - Ease of disassembly and tools required
3. Spare Parts Availability - Duration and access to spare parts
4. Spare Parts Pricing - Ratio of part prices to product price
5. Product Specific - Category-specific criteria (e.g., software support for smartphones)

Total score (0-100) is converted to display score (0-10) for consumer labeling.

classes.label: Repair Criterion
classes.comment: An individual criterion score within the French Repairability Index.

classes.label: RoHS Compliance
classes.comment:
Restriction of Hazardous Substances (RoHS) Directive compliance information
including compliance status and applicable exemptions.

classes.label: Software Support
classes.comment:
Operating system and firmware support information including update periods,
security patch availability, and end-of-support dates. Critical for electronics lifecycle
and repairability assessments per ESPR delegated acts.

Designed following ISO/IEC 12207 (software lifecycle) and ISO/IEC 14764 (software maintenance)
patterns as a potential contribution to UNTP v1.0+.

classes.label: WEEE Compliance
classes.comment:
Waste Electrical and Electronic Equipment (WEEE) Directive compliance information
including equipment category, registration number, and collection scheme.

properties.label: Annual Energy Consumption
properties.comment: Annual energy consumption in kWh. Use gs1:QuantitativeValue with unitCode 'KWH'.

properties.label: Assessment Body
properties.comment: Organization that performed the repairability assessment.

properties.label: Assessment Date
properties.comment: Date when the repairability assessment was performed.

properties.label: Bill of Materials
properties.comment: Component bill of materials for the device.

properties.label: Collection Scheme URL
properties.comment: URL to information about the WEEE collection/take-back scheme.

properties.label: Component Part Number
properties.comment: Manufacturer's part number for the component.

properties.label: Component Passport
properties.comment:
Link to the component's own Digital Product Passport (nested DPP).
Enables CIRPASS-2 multi-component tracking.

properties.label: Components
properties.comment: List of components in the bill of materials.

properties.label: Component Type
properties.comment: Type of component (Battery, Display, etc.).

properties.label: Criterion Details
properties.comment: Detailed explanation of the criterion score.

properties.label: Criterion Max Score
properties.comment: Maximum possible score for this criterion (typically 20).

properties.label: Criterion Score
properties.comment: Score for this criterion (0-20 scale).

properties.label: Criterion Type
properties.comment: Type of repair criterion being scored.

properties.label: Display Score
properties.comment: Consumer-facing repairability score (0-10 scale, totalScore/10).

properties.label: Display Specification
properties.comment: Display-specific technical specifications.

properties.label: Display Technology
properties.comment: Display technology type (LCD, OLED, AMOLED, MicroLED, etc.).

properties.label: Energy Efficiency
properties.comment: EU Energy Label information.

properties.label: Energy Efficiency Class
properties.comment: EU Energy Label class (A-G).

properties.label: Energy Label URL
properties.comment: URL to the EU Energy Label image.

properties.label: EPREL Product URL
properties.comment: URL to the product page in the EPREL database.

properties.label: EPREL Registration Number
properties.comment: European Product Registry for Energy Labelling (EPREL) registration number.

properties.label: Feature Support Years
properties.comment: Number of years of feature update support. Use gs1:QuantitativeValue with unitCode 'ANN'.

properties.label: Feature Update End Date
properties.comment: Date until which feature/OS updates will be provided.

properties.label: Firmware Version
properties.comment: Current version of the device firmware.

properties.label: IEC 62474 DSL Version
properties.comment: Version of the IEC 62474 Declarable Substance List used.

properties.label: Is Replaceable
properties.comment: Whether the component can be replaced.

properties.label: Latest Update Date
properties.comment: Date of the most recent software/firmware update.

properties.label: Material Declaration
properties.comment:
Material declaration per IEC 62474 (Declarable Substance List).
Links to oec:SubstanceOfConcern for REACH/RoHS substances.

properties.label: Material Declaration Date
properties.comment: Date of the material declaration.

properties.label: Model Identifier
properties.comment: Manufacturer's model number or identifier.

properties.label: New Version
properties.comment: Software/firmware version after update.

properties.label: OS Version
properties.comment: Current version of the operating system.

properties.label: Peak Brightness
properties.comment: Peak brightness in candelas per square meter (nits). Use gs1:QuantitativeValue. Use unitCode 'CDM2' (UN/CEFACT Rec 20).

properties.label: Power Consumption Off
properties.comment: Power consumption when switched off but plugged in. Use gs1:QuantitativeValue with unitCode 'WTT'.

properties.label: Power Consumption On
properties.comment: Power consumption when device is on/active. Use gs1:QuantitativeValue with unitCode 'WTT'.

properties.label: Power Consumption Standby
properties.comment: Power consumption in standby mode. Use gs1:QuantitativeValue with unitCode 'WTT'.

properties.label: Previous Version
properties.comment: Software/firmware version before update.

properties.label: Recoverability Rate
properties.comment: Fraction of device that can be recovered (recycling + energy recovery, 0-1 scale).

properties.label: Recyclability Rate
properties.comment: Fraction of device that can be recycled (0-1 scale).

properties.label: Refresh Rate
properties.comment: Display refresh rate. Use gs1:QuantitativeValue with unitCode 'HTZ'.

properties.label: Repairability Class
properties.comment: EU Right to Repair classification (A-E grade).

properties.label: Repairability Index
properties.comment: French Repairability Index (Indice de Réparabilité) assessment.

properties.label: Repairability Label URL
properties.comment: URL to the official repairability label image.

properties.label: Repair Criteria
properties.comment: List of individual criterion scores.

properties.label: Replacement Difficulty
properties.comment: Level of difficulty to replace this component.

properties.label: RoHS Compliance
properties.comment: RoHS Directive compliance information.

properties.label: RoHS Compliant
properties.comment: Whether the device complies with RoHS Directive.

properties.label: RoHS Declaration URL
properties.comment: URL to the RoHS compliance declaration document.

properties.label: RoHS Exemptions
properties.comment: List of applicable RoHS exemption codes (e.g., '7(a)', '7(c)-I').

properties.label: Screen Diagonal
properties.comment: Visible screen diagonal. Use gs1:QuantitativeValue with unitCode 'CMT' or 'INH'.

properties.label: Screen Resolution Height
properties.comment: Vertical resolution in pixels.

properties.label: Screen Resolution Width
properties.comment: Horizontal resolution in pixels.

properties.label: Security Support Years
properties.comment: Number of years of security update support. Use gs1:QuantitativeValue with unitCode 'ANN'.

properties.label: Security Update End Date
properties.comment: Date until which security updates will be provided.

properties.label: Software Support
properties.comment: Software and firmware support information.

properties.label: Software Update Event
properties.comment:
EPCIS extension data for software/firmware update events.
Use with bizStep 'inspecting' for software lifecycle tracking.

properties.label: Spare Part Availability Years
properties.comment: Duration for which this component is available as a spare part. Use unitCode 'ANN' (UN/CEFACT Rec 20).

properties.label: Spare Part Price
properties.comment: Price of the component as a spare part.

properties.label: Total Score
properties.comment: Total repairability score (0-100 scale, sum of 5 criteria).

properties.label: Update Channel
properties.comment: URL or method for obtaining software updates (OTA, website, etc.).

properties.label: Update Source
properties.comment: Source of the update (OTA, manual, service center, etc.).

properties.label: Update Type
properties.comment: Type of update (security, feature, firmware, driver, etc.).

properties.label: WEEE Compliance
properties.comment: WEEE Directive compliance information.

properties.label: WEEE Registration Country
properties.comment: Country of WEEE registration (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2).

properties.label: WEEE Registration Number
properties.comment: Producer registration number in the WEEE register.

enumerations.label: Component Type
enumerations.comment: Types of replaceable components in electronic devices.

values.label: Battery
values.comment: Rechargeable battery component. May link to Battery module DPP.

values.label: Camera
values.comment: Camera module.

values.label: Connector
values.comment: Port, connector, or cable component.

values.label: Cooling System
values.comment: Thermal management components (fans, heat sinks).

values.label: Display
values.comment: Display panel (LCD, OLED, etc.).

values.label: Enclosure
values.comment: Casing or housing component.

values.label: Keyboard
values.comment: Keyboard or keypad component.

values.label: Memory
values.comment: Random access memory (RAM) module.

values.label: Microphone
values.comment: Microphone component.

values.label: Motherboard
values.comment: Main circuit board.

values.label: Power Supply
values.comment: Power supply unit or charging circuit.

values.label: Processor
values.comment: Central processing unit (CPU) or system-on-chip (SoC).

values.label: Speaker
values.comment: Audio speaker component.

values.label: Storage
values.comment: Data storage device (SSD, HDD, eMMC).

values.label: Trackpad
values.comment: Trackpad or touchpad component.

enumerations.label: Device Category
enumerations.comment: Category of electronic device per ESPR delegated acts and WEEE classifications.

values.label: Data Storage Device
values.comment: Data storage devices including external drives and NAS systems.

values.label: Desktop Computer
values.comment: Personal computer designed for use at a fixed location.

values.label: Dishwasher
values.comment: Household dishwashing machine.

values.label: Display/Monitor
values.comment: Computer monitor or display device.

values.label: Laptop
values.comment: Portable personal computer with integrated display and keyboard.

values.label: Network Equipment
values.comment: Networking devices including routers, switches, and access points.

values.label: Printer
values.comment: Printing device including inkjet, laser, and multifunction printers.

values.label: Refrigerator
values.comment: Household refrigerating appliance.

values.label: Server
values.comment: Computer designed to provide services to other computers or networks.

values.label: Small Household Appliance
values.comment: Small household electrical appliance (toasters, kettles, etc.).

values.label: Smartphone
values.comment: Mobile phone with advanced computing capabilities.

values.label: Tablet
values.comment: Portable touch-screen computing device.

values.label: Television
values.comment: Television set for video display and reception.

values.label: Vacuum Cleaner
values.comment: Household vacuum cleaning appliance.

values.label: Washing Machine
values.comment: Household washing machine for clothing and textiles.

values.label: Wearable Device
values.comment: Wearable electronic device including smartwatches and fitness trackers.

enumerations.label: Energy Efficiency Class
enumerations.comment: EU Energy Label efficiency classes (A-G) per EU 2019/2021.

values.label: Energy Class A
values.comment: Most energy efficient (green label).

values.label: Energy Class B
values.comment: Very energy efficient.

values.label: Energy Class C
values.comment: Energy efficient.

values.label: Energy Class D
values.comment: Average energy efficiency.

values.label: Energy Class E
values.comment: Below average energy efficiency.

values.label: Energy Class F
values.comment: Low energy efficiency.

values.label: Energy Class G
values.comment: Least energy efficient (red label).

enumerations.label: EU Repairability Class
enumerations.comment: EU Right to Repair repairability grades (A-E) based on repairability score ranges.

values.label: Repairability Class A
values.comment: Highest repairability (score 8.1-10.0). Easily repairable by consumers and professionals.

values.label: Repairability Class B
values.comment: High repairability (score 6.1-8.0). Good repair support available.

values.label: Repairability Class C
values.comment: Moderate repairability (score 4.1-6.0). Some repair limitations.

values.label: Repairability Class D
values.comment: Limited repairability (score 2.1-4.0). Significant repair barriers.

values.label: Repairability Class E
values.comment: Lowest repairability (score 0-2.0). Difficult or impossible to repair.

enumerations.label: Repair Criterion Type
enumerations.comment: Types of criteria in the French Repairability Index (5 criteria, 20 points each).

values.label: Disassembly
values.comment: Ease of disassembly, reassembly, and tools required (20 points max).

values.label: Documentation
values.comment: Availability and quality of repair documentation (20 points max).

values.label: Product Specific Criteria
values.comment: Category-specific criteria such as software support duration (20 points max).

values.label: Spare Parts Availability
values.comment: Duration of spare parts availability and access channels (20 points max).

values.label: Spare Parts Pricing
values.comment: Ratio of spare part prices to product price (20 points max).

enumerations.label: Replacement Difficulty
enumerations.comment: Level of difficulty for component replacement.

values.label: Not Replaceable
values.comment: Component is soldered, glued, or otherwise not designed for replacement.

values.label: Professional Only
values.comment: Requires professional repair service.

values.label: Tool Required
values.comment: Requires specialized tools but can be done by skilled user.

values.label: User Replaceable
values.comment: Can be replaced by user without tools or with basic tools.

values.label: WEEE Category 1: Temperature Exchange Equipment
values.comment: Refrigerators, freezers, air conditioners, heat pumps.

values.label: WEEE Category 2: Screens and Monitors
values.comment: Televisions, monitors, laptops, notebooks, tablets.

values.label: WEEE Category 3: Lamps
values.comment: Fluorescent lamps, LED lamps, high-intensity discharge lamps.

values.label: WEEE Category 4: Large Equipment
values.comment: Washing machines, dishwashers, electric stoves, large printing machines, large medical devices.

values.label: WEEE Category 5: Small Equipment
values.comment: Vacuum cleaners, microwaves, ventilation equipment, toasters, shavers, scales, calculators, radios, video cameras, small electrical and electronic tools.

values.label: WEEE Category 6: Small IT and Telecommunication Equipment
values.comment: Mobile phones, GPS, pocket calculators, routers, personal computers, printers, telephones.
